name: bad-mask cover singleton smoke

build.command: python3 scripts/run_memory_guarded.py --max-tree-rss-mib 9000 --min-available-mib 8192 --poll-seconds 0.5 --json /tmp/cuboctahedron_ap16bf_bad_mask_cover_smoke_guard_fixed2.json -- bash -lc 'export LEAN_NUM_THREADS=1; export LAKE_JOBS=1; timeout 180s lake build Cuboctahedron.Generated.Translation.TwoSource.SupportFamilies.PositiveSurvivorPrecomputedSignatureSmoke 2>&1 | tee /tmp/cuboctahedron_ap16bf_bad_mask_cover_smoke_build_fixed2.log'

notes: Instantiates BadMaskCover for the rank-100805 singleton survivor bitset using the AP16BD greedy Boolean cube complement cover.
Uses existing per-mask nonpositive-denominator witnesses inside cube soundness as a regression baseline.
Confirms that BadMaskCover composes with the AP16AZ semantic precomputed signature theorem to close AllTranslationGoodCoverageOnRange 100805 100806.
Does not yet prove denominator-cube or pseudo-Boolean Farkas soundness for a whole cube; that remains the next compression step.
